articles.author: Jay Peters
articles.title: OnePlus is reportedly bailing on the US - The Verge
articles.description: Oppo-owned OnePlus plans to announce in the coming days that it will be exiting the US and European markets, according to WinFuture.
articles.content: And apparently Europe, too. And apparently Europe, too. by Jay PetersClose Posts from this author will be added to your daily email digest and your homepage … [+1736 chars]
